category_sources: source_facts.description identifies gup as a tool to update binaries installed by go install; official GitHub About text describes the same update function.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gup; official GitHub repository is nao1215/gup.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project documentation surface for installation and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/nao1215/gup, so repo enrichment is intentionally not repeated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub About text identify updating go install binaries; official GitHub topics include go, golang, updater, cli-app, and command-line-tool.
